recommendations.title: Neither Seen Nor Recognized
recommendations.overview: In a small French village, everything would be quiet if the local wildlife cop was not being ridiculed by a smart poacher.

recommendations.title: The Tall Blond Man with One Black Shoe
recommendations.overview: A hapless orchestra player becomes an unwitting pawn of rival factions within the French secret service after he is chosen as a decoy by being identified as a super secret agent.

recommendations.title: We Will All Meet in Paradise

recommendations.title: War of the Buttons
recommendations.overview: For generations, two rival French villages, Longueverne and Velrans, have been at war. But this is no ordinary conflict, for the on-going hostilities are between two armies of young schoolboys. When he is beaten by his father for having lost his butt

recommendations.title: My Father's Glory
recommendations.overview: Raised by his science teacher father, Joseph Pagnol, and seamstress mother Augustine, young Marcel grows up during the turn of the century in awe of his rationalist dad. When the family takes a summer vacation in the countryside, Marcel becomes frien

recommendations.title: My Mother's Castle
recommendations.overview: To his chagrin, young Marcel Pagnol and his family move back to their home in Marseille, France, far from their pastoral holiday cottage in the hills. Determined, Marcel makes the long voyage back to the cottage on foot and lands himself in trouble.

recommendations.title: Very Happy Alexander
recommendations.overview: Alexandre, a young and honest farmer, is oppressed by an authoritarian wife, who makes him work like a dog. When she dies in a car crash, he decides to stay in bed, absolutely free and inactive. Just a dog is occupied to carry food and newspapers to

recommendations.title: The Return of the Tall Blond Man with One Black Shoe
recommendations.overview: With "little captain" Cambrai raising serious doubts about the reality of the so-called "super spy," Colonel Toulouse kidnaps Christine and forces Francois to play again the character of "The Tall Blond Man with One Black Shoe" in some fake adventure

recommendations.title: Playing It Cool
recommendations.overview: A young man meets and instantly falls in love with an engaged woman.

recommendations.title: Mrs. Harris Goes to Paris
recommendations.overview: A 1950s London cleaning lady falls in love with an haute couture dress by Christian Dior and decides to gamble everything for the sake of this folly.
